LanguageData.TwistedSunAlertTXT_Incoming: A twisted sun will soon rise. Find shelter indoors immediately.
LanguageData.TwistedSunAlertTXT_Active: The twisted sun has risen. Anyone outside will begin a horrid, rapid transformation.
LanguageData.TwistedSunAlertTXT_Inactive: The twisted sun has set until morning, around 05:00. Caution should still be taken and ventures outside should only happen if absolutely necessary.
LanguageData.TwistedSunArrivedText: The atmosphere begins to be cut with a sudden red brilliance. The twisted sun has risen.\n\nRemain indoors at all times. During night, ventures may be made outside at the risk of the individual.
LanguageData.TwistedSunNightfall: The sun has set for now. It is relatively safe to go outside until the next morning
LanguageData.TwistedSunMorning: The sun will rise within an hour or two! Get back inside!
LanguageData.CleanRitualCompleteText: {0_nameDef} has finished performing {RITUAL_definite} ritual. The archotech will soon cleanse the area of twisted mechanites.{1}
LanguageData.SingleVisitorArrivesFleshprise: {PAWN_titleIndef} from {1} is visiting the colony.\n\n{PAWN_pronoun} is named {PAWN_nameFull}.
LanguageData.GroupVisitorsArriveFleshprise: A group from {0} are visiting the colony.
LanguageData.AdditionalRitualRewardTF: Due to a high ritual quality, fleshbeasts in the area will also be weakened.
LanguageData.AdditionalRitualRewardTFREQ: At this ritual quality, any fleshbeasts spawned on the map will also be weakened for a medium duration.
LanguageData.TFMS_RESTART: Requires a Game Restart to Apply Changes.\n\n
LanguageData.TFMS_Fingers: Fingerspikes will not be infected with twisted mechanites if this is disabled
